channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Couple finds winning $1M Powerball ticket on Christmas Day, hours before expiration
item.description: A Kendallville couple is $1 million dollars richer after finding the winning Powerball ticket just hours before it was set to expire.
item.dc:creator: Marin Murphy, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Man indicted in burning death of woman inside New York City subway train: prosecutors
item.description: The indictment comes days after Sebastian Zapeta’s arrest and subsequent police questioning, in which authorities say he claimed not to know what had happened but identified himself in photos and surveillance video showing the fire being lit.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ukrainian drone attack was underway before Azerbaijani plane crashed, Russian aviation chief says
item.description: Russia's aviation chief said Friday that a Ukrainian drone attack was underway in the Russian region that an airliner was destined for before it diverted and crashed earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe survives close brush with the sun's scorching surface
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — NASA's Parker Solar Probe has successfully made the closest approach to the sun, the space agency confirmed Friday. Earlier this week, the spacecraft passed within a record-breaking 3.8 million miles (6 million kilometers) of the scorching star.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Netflix's 'Missing You' lands in time for New Year binge watch
item.description: LONDON (AP) — It’s Netflix’s resolution every new year to give viewers a headscratcher in January. Since 2020, the streamer has released a U.K. miniseries based on thriller book by Harlan Coben over the holidays.
item.dc:creator: HILARY FOX, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Climate-friendly electricity sees big battery projects soar again for 2024
item.description: 2024 was another banner year for a source of electricity that is better for people's lungs, better for climate change and may be reaching your home when you turn on the lights or turn up the thermostat — large banks of batteries.
item.dc:creator: ALEXA ST. JOHN and MARY KATHERINE WILDEMAN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Most blame insurance profits and denials alongside the killer in UHC CEO death: poll
item.description: Most Americans believe health insurance profits and coverage denials share responsibility for the killing of UnitedHealthcare's CEO — although not as much as the person who pulled the trigger, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What to know about South Korean acting President Han's impeachment
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — The impeachment of South Korea's acting President Han Duck-soo Friday has plunged the country into further political turmoil, coming less than two weeks after lawmakers impeached President Yoon Suk Yeol.
item.dc:creator: HYUNG-JIN KIM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: SEE IT: ‘Peanut-shaped’ roundabout ready to open in Ohio
item.description: In a post to the city's Facebook page, officials offered "a few pointers to help drivers navigate safely.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, KREX 5

item.title: In states that ban abortion, social safety net programs often fail families
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. (AP) — Taylor Cagnacci moved from California to Tennessee with hopes of starting a new chapter in a state that touts a low cost of living and natural beauty.
item.dc:creator: LAURA UNGAR and KIMBERLEE KRUESI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: More Americans say they need a break from political news: Survey
item.description: Most adults want a break from political news due to overload and fatigue, according to a new survey from the Associated Press-NORC Center for Public Affairs Research.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Jackpot for Mega Millions over $1 billion after no numbers match on Christmas Eve
item.description: The estimated jackpot for Friday is $1.15 billion, potentially the fifth-largest jackpot in the game's history.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Getting too close to first responders will soon be a crime in Florida
item.description: Florida will soon have a so-called “Halo Law” meant to protect first responders. The new law, starting in January, creates a 25 feet buffer zone around law enforcement officers, firefighters, and emergency medical crews.
item.dc:creator: Ty Russell, NewsNation

item.title: Canadian ministers head to Palm Beach for talks with incoming Trump administration
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Two top Canadian Cabinet ministers are visiting Palm Beach to talk border security and trade with the incoming Donald Trump administration as Trump threatens tariffs on all Canadian products.
item.dc:creator: ROB GILLIES, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge says woman accusing Jay-Z, Sean 'Diddy' Combs of raping her at age 13 can proceed anonymously
item.description: A federal judge says an Alabama woman accusing Jay-Z and Sean “Diddy” Combs of raping her when she was 13 years old can proceed anonymously for now with her lawsuit against the music moguls.
item.dc:creator: Larry Neumeister, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Woman says to-be fiancé died in Christmas house fire searching for ring
item.description: A California man died in a Christmas morning house fire while searching for an engagement ring for his girlfriend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OpenAI's ChatGPT and Sora are down: Here's what we know
item.description: ChatGPT, the artificial intelligence chatbot developed by OpenAI, is experiencing an outage on Thursday afternoon. According to Downdector.com, thousands of users have reported outages after a surge in reports beginning around 10:20 a.m. PST.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: Year-end travel: What you need to know about post-holiday trips
item.description: CHICAGO (NewsNation) — Millions of Americans are traveling on Thursday as a record-breaking post-holiday rush continues. The Transportation Security Administration anticipates Friday to be one of the season's busiest days, with 40 million passengers projected to be screened on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Nick Smith, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Florida woman arrested after allegedly breaking in, stabbing person over pizza delivery tip
item.description: Armed with a knife, the suspect began attacking one of the victims, allegedly upset about the tip she received during an earlier delivery, deputies said.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Christmas shooting at Phoenix airport leaves 3 people wounded, 1 stabbed
item.description: Authorities are investigating a Christmas shooting at Sky Harbor Airport in Phoenix that left three people injured by gunfire and another person stabbed. Police said the incident was related to a family dispute.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Friday's Mega Millions drawing is worth an estimated $1.15 billion, one of the game's top jackpots
item.description: Americans still dreaming of a really big Christmas present can keep that dream alive during Friday’s Mega Millions drawing for a jackpot worth an estimated $1.15 billion.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cat food distributed to Florida recalled after positive bird flu test; 1 cat dead
item.description: The product was sold through distributors in Arizona, California, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island and Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Cat food distributed to 12 states recalled after positive bird flu test; 1 cat dead
item.description: The product was sold through distributors in Arizona, California, Colorado, Florida, Georgia, Illinois, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, Pennsylvania, Rhode Island and Wisconsin.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Azerbaijani airliner with 67 people onboard crashes in Kazakhstan leaving 32 survivors
item.description: An Azerbaijani airliner with 67 people onboard crashed Wednesday near the Kazakhstani city of Aktau, leaving at least 32 survivors, according to officials. More than 30 people may be dead.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Mississippi authorities searching for escaped convicted killer
item.description: GREENE COUNTY, Miss, (WJTV) – The Mississippi Department of Corrections (MDOC) is searching for a convicted killer who escaped from a Greene County prison Tuesday afternoon. The MDOC inmate, 33-year-old Drew Johnson, is a white male with blond hair and blue eyes.
item.dc:creator: Garret Grove, NewsNation

item.title: Dolly Parton's Imagination Library seeks New York state expansion
item.description: Advocates are asking Gov. Kathy Hochul for money in the next state budget to make New York an official state for the program.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Richard Perry, record producer behind 'You're So Vain' and other hits, dies at 82
item.description: Richard Perry, a hitmaking record producer with a flair for both standards and contemporary sounds whose many successes included Carly Simon’s “You’re So Vain,” Rod Stewart’s “The Great American Songbook” series and a Ringo Starr album featuring all four Beatles, died Tuesday. He was 82.
item.dc:creator: HILLEL ITALIE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Man arraigned on murder charges in NYC subway death fanned flames with a shirt, prosecutors say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The man accused of burning a woman to death inside a New York City subway train used a shirt to fan the flames, a prosecutor said Tuesday at his arraignment on murder charges. Sebastian Zapeta, 33, who federal immigration officials said is a Guatemalan citizen who entered the U.S.
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Eye drops recalled nationwide due to fungal contamination
item.description: Check your medicine cabinets: A brand of eye drops sold nationally has been recalled due to the presence of fungus, which may cause vision damage.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Self, ABC 4

item.title: Opinion: Elon Musk wants to ‘delete’ many Americans' financial lifeline
item.description: It is especially surprising that one of the first federal agencies to come under scrutiny from the incoming administration is one that has returned billions of dollars to many of the same consumers who were counting on leaders in Washington to look out for their wallets.
item.dc:creator: Sharon McGowan, opinion contributor, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 174 Colorado skiers and snowboarders rescued after a lift cracks
item.description: WINTER PARK, Colo. (AP) — Officials were investigating Sunday what caused a crack in a Colorado ski lift that forced the evacuation of over 170 stranded skiers and snowboarders.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4
